title: Founder, Chief Executive Officer, and Cognitive Architect
summary: Artan Davoodi founded Neuroartan to build ICOS, a cognitive operating system where software adapts to human thought, memory, voice, and continuity.
biography: Artan leads Neuroartan from the founder seat, shaping ICOS as a new kind of software system for thought, memory, voice, and continuity.
His work is guided by a simple principle: software should adapt to humans, instead of forcing humans to adapt to software.
Neuroartan is being built as a focused company around clearer thinking, usable memory, and long-term cognitive infrastructure.
mandate: Build a future where software adapts to human thought, voice, memory, and continuity — and guide Neuroartan with the clarity, restraint, and discipline required to make that future real.
